name: Holland Heights Golf Course
about: Holland Heights Golf Course is a family-owned and operated 18-hole golf venue located in the rolling hills of Herkimer, New York, with a blue-collar pricing philosophy. The facility offers a mix of traditional outdoor golf and indoor golf simulation, featuring two Full Swing simulators that provide year-round play. The venue emphasizes a welcoming, family-like atmosphere, aiming to deliver a scenic, well-maintained, and challenging experience with country club conditions at accessible prices. In addition to golf and simulation, the venue includes a banquet hall for large events and a Pub & Pro Shop.
why_golfers_like_it: Features the same premium Full Swing simulators used in the TGL league
Offers year-round play regardless of weather conditions
Provides a scenic and challenging 18-hole course with stunning views
Hosts large-scale events in a spacious, customizable banquet hall

food_and_drink.notes: On-site kitchen and food service available for events and in the Pub & Pro Shop
Full bar service available in the Pub & Pro Shop

simulator_hardware.notes: Two state-of-the-art Full Swing simulators, upgraded in late 2018 with new software and projectors

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, players should bring their own clubs to use with the simulators or for play on the course.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drink are not permitted. The venue has an on-site kitchen and full bar in the Pub & Pro Shop.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes on the simulator?
faq.answer: Playing 18 holes on the simulator typically takes about 1-2 hours, depending on group size and pace of play.

faq.question: Is Holland Heights kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue welcomes families and kid-friendly activities, including simulator play and hosting family events like reunions.
